---
name: Experiment follow-up
about: Track a retest, follow-up, or unresolved experiment question
title: "[Experiment] "
labels: experiment
assignees: ""
---

## Summary
What needs to be re-tested or followed up?

## Why now
What changed or what uncertainty remains?

## Related items
- Experiment note:
- Decision record:
- MLflow run(s):
- Git commit(s):

## Trigger
- [ ] assumption changed
- [ ] upstream feature changed
- [ ] validation design changed
- [ ] model family changed
- [ ] calibration changed
- [ ] simulation engine changed

## Done when
- [ ] experiment re-run
- [ ] results summarized
- [ ] decision updated
